'''Trel Modetto''' was an [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]]/[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] native to the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. He spent many years traveling around the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] with the [[Void Demons]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang. He later deserted the gang and stole a small freighter named the ''[[Eternal Hope]]'' and made his way back to the Tapani Sector, on the way selling his services as a smuggler, outlaw tech, freelance gunman, and scout. When he left the services of the pirate gang, he stole the location of a secret pirate [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]], that the Void Demons were naturally keen to seek retribution for. He became wanted by [[House Mecetti]] when he tried to sell the location of the shadowport but managed to ruin the deal in some way. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities and numerous illegal moneylenders also wanted to locate Trel.

==Appearances==
